Name: Resolve Address
Description: Resolve a universal address (>beacon/context/path) to a concrete URL and metadata, with optional transfer strategy resolution (local/direct/proxy) when a requesting beacon is specified.

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write the resolved result object (optional)

SettingsInputs.Name: RequestingBeaconID
SettingsInputs.Description: BeaconID of the requesting beacon (enables transfer strategy resolution)

StateOutputs.Name: URL
StateOutputs.Description: Best URL for the resolved address (chosen by strategy)

StateOutputs.Name: BeaconID
StateOutputs.Description: ID of the beacon that owns the resource

StateOutputs.Name: Strategy
StateOutputs.Description: Transfer strategy: local, direct, or proxy

StateOutputs.Name: DirectURL
StateOutputs.Description: Direct beacon-to-beacon URL (when strategy is direct)

StateOutputs.Name: ProxyURL
StateOutputs.Description: Proxy URL through Ultravisor (when strategy is proxy)
